comment: InstructIR Master Restorer prompt library. Each preset pairs with workflow names and optional ensemble_hint for the conductor.

presets.title: JPEG cleanup
presets.instruction: Remove JPEG compression artifacts and blockiness while preserving natural detail and edges.

presets.title: Heavy denoise
presets.instruction: Strongly reduce sensor noise and grain while keeping edges sharp; avoid plastic over-smoothing.

presets.title: Deblur faces carefully
presets.instruction: Sharpen slight blur and restore facial detail carefully without inventing identity or makeup.

presets.title: Low-light lift
presets.instruction: Brighten underexposed areas, reduce crushed shadows, and control amplified noise.

presets.title: Blown highlight rescue
presets.instruction: Regenerate natural detail in overexposed and blown-out regions; preserve unclipped areas.

presets.title: Scratched print
presets.instruction: Remove dust, scratches and paper defects while keeping film grain and paper texture.

presets.title: VHS dump
presets.instruction: Clean VHS tape capture: reduce chroma noise, deblock, and restore modest sharpness without cartoon edges.

presets.title: 35mm film scan
presets.instruction: Restore a scanned 35mm still: gentle denoise, natural colour, careful face detail.

presets.title: B&W restore (no recolour)
presets.instruction: Restore this black-and-white photograph. Do not invent colour; keep monochrome tones natural.

presets.title: Colorize accompany
presets.instruction: Support colourization with natural historical palette; avoid neon or surreal hues.

presets.title: Dual-face natural
presets.instruction: Restore faces to a natural look with balanced skin texture; avoid plastic skin.

presets.title: Archival soft
presets.instruction: Gentle archival restoration: reduce defects modestly and keep period character.

presets.title: Max perceptual
presets.instruction: Maximize perceptual clarity and detail for display; mild generative enhancement is acceptable.

presets.title: Fidelity first
presets.instruction: Prefer fidelity over punch: remove only clear degradation; do not invent texture.

presets.title: Night DarkIR guide
presets.instruction: Guide low-light restoration toward clean night photography with controlled contrast.

presets.title: Remove dust keep grain
presets.instruction: Remove dust spots and scratches but preserve authentic film grain.

presets.title: Phone snapshot
presets.instruction: Clean a phone snapshot: mild denoise, fix compression, keep a natural look.

presets.title: Wedding candid
presets.instruction: Restore a candid portrait: soft faces, clean skin without plastic effect, natural colours.

presets.title: Animation / cartoon
presets.instruction: Clean flat-colour and line art: light denoise, keep edges crisp, avoid painterly smear.

presets.title: General instruct pass
presets.instruction: Restore this photograph following a balanced all-in-one cleanup of blur, noise, and compression.

presets.title: Old film / motion picture
presets.instruction: Restore aged motion-picture stills: deblock, denoise, gentle face recovery, keep film character.

presets.title: Inpaint cleanup
presets.instruction: Support object removal and hole fill with seamless surrounding texture.

presets.title: Efficient quality upscale
presets.instruction: Enhance resolution and clarity with efficient transformer-class detail recovery.

presets.title: Creative blind restore
presets.instruction: Blind restoration with mild creative clarity; keep the photo believable.
